temporal_description:
(00:00-00:01) A man in a dark suit runs frantically across a wet, dark street at night. The scene is blurry, with the out-of-focus lights of cars creating a bokeh effect in the background. He looks over his shoulder in panic as he flees. (Storyline: The scene opens with a high-stakes chase, immediately establishing a tense and dangerous situation as a character is being pursued.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: Tense, fast-paced electronic music begins, accompanied by the sound of running footsteps splashing in water.)
(00:02-00:05) In a wide shot, a chaotic scene unfolds on a wet, reflective plaza at night. Several men are engaged in a brawl next to a silver sedan. Police officers in dark uniforms are arriving, shouting and trying to intervene as the fight continues. (Storyline: The scene escalates from a single chase to a full-blown brawl, with the arrival of police indicating that a major incident has occurred.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Authoritative, shouting. 2) Background sounds or music: The tense music continues, mixed with shouting, scuffling sounds, and the ambient noise of the city.)
